title: Blue Canyon Penguin Printed Shower Curtains | 100% Peva Shower Curtain | Anti-Bacterial Surface Treatment | Water Repellent| Weighted Hem | 180 X 180cm | 12 Reinforced Eyelets with Hooks (Penguin)
features: ☑️【 100% POLYESTER 】: 100% woven polyester with Water-resistant coating; These glittery designed shower curtains by blue canyon are made to withstand damp, moisture-rich bathroom and shower environments; Easy care - machine washable; For best results, open fully after each use to air dry.

☑️【 ANTI BACTERIAL SURFACE 】: Blue Canyon Shower Curtain Fabric is treated with an antibacterial finish offer additional protection against bacteria, viruses, and mould. Fabrics with antibacterial finishes may find purpose in all sorts of applications, including indoor and outdoor environments, hospitals, and homes.

☑️【 WEIGHTED HEM 】: The weighted bottom hem keeps the liner in place and reduces billowing; the Reinforced top hem makes it easy to install with most types of shower curtain hooks or rings; The high-quality weave gives this curtain liner a soft hand feel, and it drapes nicely; Use alone or behind your favourite decorative curtain; Protect your decorative shower curtains and keep them dry.

☑️【 EASY INSTALLATION 】: This anti-mould shower curtain of size 180 x 180cm is equipped with 12 rustproof metal eyelets to be suitable for straight or curved shower bars. There is no scratching noise; it is effortless and quick to install. The various shower curtain colour is ideal for most standard-sized bathrooms/bathtubs.

☑️【 WATER RESISTANT 】: The tight weave and superior quality of the fabric provide it with a firm, smooth texture which promotes water bead formation and prevents curtain soaking and bathroom floor messes; Water-resistant coating allows water beads to form across the curtain, allowing for quick water removal and swift drying; No more slippery floors; This curtain will keep your bathroom floors free from splashes and sprays of water.
